title: Lab 12: Find And Copy With Structure
description: Locate recent files owned by a user and copy them while preserving directories

tasks: Find all files owned by natfind and modified in the last 24 hours under /opt/lab12/source.
Copy them to /root/natfind-files and preserve the original directory structure.
hints: Use find with a time test and --parents or an equivalent method.
checks: diff -u <(find /opt/lab12/source -type f -user natfind -mtime -1 | sed 's#^/opt/lab12/source#/root/natfind-files#' | sort) <(find /root/natfind-files -type f | sort)
